project: Forge: AI-powered project management with issue tracking, agent execution, and multi-client support
architecture: Web/Desktop UIs → core (Hono) REST API + WebSocket → Postgres (Drizzle). core (packages/core) is a single Node process that serves REST, WebSocket, and an MCP server, and runs AI agents via Claude CLI or cloud APIs.

conventions.naming: kebab-case dirs, camelCase TS, snake_case Rust. Feature-based organization in web/dev.
conventions.api: Hono routes mounted under /api/<plural> in packages/core. Bearer token auth. WebSocket at /ws for real-time.
conventions.state: React Query for server state (web/dev). Zustand for client state (dev). Drizzle + DB triggers / route hooks for cascading updates in core.

recipes.new-endpoint: 1) Create packages/core/src/{name}/routes.ts (+ tests). 2) Mount in packages/core/src/index.ts. 3) Add WS broadcast if needed.
recipes.new-page-web: 1) Create packages/web/src/app/(protected)/{path}/page.tsx. 2) Add feature module in packages/web/src/features/{name}/ with api.ts, types.ts, hooks/.
recipes.new-agent-tool: 1) Add tool in packages/core/src/mcp/tools/forge-{name}.ts. 2) Register in packages/core/src/mcp/server.ts.
